candidates.mechanism: Deduplicate mandatory context by path and cap broad effect-frontier seed/effect expansion while retaining diagnostics.
repository_evidence: repoctl start failed with duplicate_mandatory_context_path on real repository facts.
broad product task produced 1732 seed nodes and approximately 79787 pre-dedupe effect records before JSON serialization failed.
affected_invariants: valid task capsule before plan admission
dirty work is recorded, not hidden
candidates.prediction: Broad planning tasks can start with truncation diagnostics rather than RangeError.
candidates.falsifier: repoctl start on the broad generated-bespoke task still fails or emits duplicate mandatory context paths.
proof_obligations: unit contract covers bounded effect-frontier behavior
candidates.risk: The effect frontier becomes explicitly partial for broad tasks; downstream claims must read diagnostics and avoid treating truncated P0 as complete impact proof.

rejected_alternatives.reason: Does not fix unbounded artifact semantics or duplicate mandatory context paths.
Would weaken the control plane by removing required effect diagnostics.
Unnecessary scope expansion for two localized start-time defects.

proof_obligations.reason: repoctl could not admit a normal plan until duplicate context and frontier blow-up were repaired; red compiler evidence is retained.

discovered_later_policy: Any additional source path requires explicit evidence before evaluation.
